name: Salata Lahano-Domates (Cabbage-tomato Sal
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the cabbage and cut it in half.
2. Shred the cabbage.
3. Place the shredded cabbage in a strainer and wash under running water for several minutes, then drain well.
4. Wash and slice half of the tomatoes; cut the remaining tomatoes into wedges.
5. Mound the cabbage in the center of a round platter.
6. Surround the cabbage with tomato slices.
7. Place an olive in the center of the cabbage and circle it with tomato wedges.
8. Place a sprig of parsley in the olive.
9. Scatter other olives on top of the cabbage.
10. Just before serving, pour oil and vinegar dressing (or oil and lemon juice dressing) over the salad.
11. Season lightly with salt.
